src: A young man with short, styled hair and a clean-shaven face, wearing a casual shirt. He has a relaxed posture, well-defined features, bright eyes, and a slight smile, depicted in a pencil sketch.
edit: A young man with short hair and clean-shaven face, dressed in a casual shirt, having a relaxed posture. He has bright eyes and a slight smile.

per_image_non_shared_src.1: A person leaning forward on a motorcycle rides with a landscape background of fluffy clouds and fields, dust trails behind.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: the person holds a diploma, wearing a graduation cap and gown, surrounded by other graduates, with fluffy clouds in the sky.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The person is seated at a table, focused on reading a book, surrounded by filled bookshelves, in a library.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The person faces forward with a neutral expression against a textured backdrop in a formal portrait style.
per_image_non_shared_src.5: A person types on a laptop at a desk with a notepad and mug beside, in an office with framed pictures and a window view of buildings.
per_image_non_shared_src.6: A person stands with hands in pockets in a park setting with tall trees and clouds overhead.

per_image_non_shared_edit.1: Person leaning forward on a motorcycle, riding, with background of landscape, fluffy clouds, fields, and dust trailing behind.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: A person holds up a diploma, wearing a graduation cap and gown, surrounded by graduates, with fluffy clouds in the sky.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The person is seated at a table, reading a book, surrounded by bookshelves filled with books in a library.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: A person facing forward with a neutral expression against a textured backdrop in a simple formal portrait.
per_image_non_shared_edit.5: A person types on a laptop at a desk, with a notepad and mug beside, in an office with framed pictures and a window view of buildings.
per_image_non_shared_edit.6: a person stands with hands in pockets among tall trees and fluffy clouds in a park.
